intro: OpenAI will publicly release its GPT-5.6 AI models, ending government-requested restrictions that previously limited access to the company's latest systems. SK Hynix begins trading on Nasdaq Friday as the memory chip market faces pressure from the ongoing AI chip downturn. A Canadian province is preparing legal action against OpenAI following a school shooting, alleging the company failed to alert authorities to violent prompts made on ChatGPT.

whitelist.title: OpenAI to publicly release GPT-5.6 AI models, ending government-requested limits
whitelist.desc: OpenAI's chief rival, Anthropic, recently restored access to its latest models following a weeks-long clash with the government.

whitelist.title: SK Hynix slumps ahead of US listing as AI chip rout deepens
whitelist.desc: The memory giant will start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday.

whitelist.title: Canadian province prepares lawsuit against OpenAI after school mass shooting
whitelist.desc: Action being taken against OpenAI for its failure to alert authorities to violent prompts on ChatGPT before the shooting.

whitelist.desc: From drones to dog-wellness, the franchise industry is leaning heavily into AI. And things are just getting started.
